name: hydrogen-cyanide_pka_acidity
prompt: Run the pka-acidity task on hydrogen-cyanide using the PM7 (MOPAC) semi-empirical method in implicit water solvent, in absolute mode. Report the aqueous pKa as the headline value, and state the method, mode, solvent, and charges used. Note PM7 (semi-empirical) pKa values are screening-grade; this is a screening estimate (single-conformer, implicit solvent only). Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
